<!-- What are you trying to do that's hard or impossible today? -->

<!-- Optional: how you imagine it behaving (which knob/button/display, a setting, etc.). -->

<!-- Optional. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Aircraft, add-ons, links, screenshots — anything that helps. -->
